title: oreogrammitis oblanceolata
intro: Oreogrammitis oblanceolata, also known as the mountain fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis oblanceolata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
